SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-22-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGELA COOPER.
